## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — Code refactor (no feature/fix)
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation update
- [ ] `chore` — Build, tooling, or config change
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD change

## Checklist

### Correctness

- [ ] Types are correct, no implicit `any`
- [ ] Edge cases handled (null, empty, boundary values)
- [ ] Error states handled with proper messages
- [ ] No regressions to existing functionality

### Quality

- [ ] Minimal diff — only changes needed for the task
- [ ] No dead code, commented-out code, or `console.log`
- [ ] Functions < 40 lines, max 3 params
- [ ] Naming is clear and consistent with codebase

### Safety

- [ ] No secrets, keys, or PII in code or logs
- [ ] Inputs validated at boundaries
- [ ] No new dependencies added without prior discussion

### UI (if applicable)

- [ ] Uses semantic Tailwind tokens only (no hardcoded colors)
- [ ] Matches existing component styles (`rounded-lg`, `gap-4`, etc.)
- [ ] Light and dark mode both look correct
- [ ] Accessible (alt text, labels, keyboard navigation)

### Documentation

- [ ] Public APIs documented with JSDoc/TSDoc
- [ ] Breaking changes noted
- [ ] README updated if needed
